collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (3 total Queries, 3 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT DISTINCT `dg`.`id`, `dg`.`id_personal`, `dg`.`id_curso`, `dg`.`id_schoolyear`, CONCAT(p.nombre, " ", p.apellido) as nombre_personal, `cb`.`nombre_curso`, `s`.`nombre` as `nombre_schoolyear`, `e`.`nombre` as `nombre_escuela` FROM (`docentes_guia`, `docentes_guia` `dg`) JOIN `personal` `p` ON `p`.`id` = `dg`.`id_personal` JOIN `escuela` `e` ON `e`.`id` = `p`.`id_escuela` JOIN `cursos` `c` ON `c`.`id` = `dg`.`id_curso` JOIN `cursos_base` `cb` ON `cb`.`id` = `c`.`id_cursos_base` JOIN `schoolyear` `s` ON `s`.`id` = `dg`.`id_schoolyear` WHERE `dg`.`id_schoolyear` = '1' ORDER BY `e`.`nombre`, `cb`.`nombre_curso`

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT DISTINCT `dg`.`id`, `dg`.`id_personal`, `dg`.`id_curso`, `dg`.`id_schoolyear`, CONCAT(p.nombre, " ", p.apellido) as nombre_personal, `cb`.`nombre_curso`, `s`.`nombre` as `nombre_schoolyear`, `e`.`nombre` as `nombre_escuela` FROM (`docentes_guia`, `docentes_guia` `dg`) JOIN `personal` `p` ON `p`.`id` = `dg`.`id_personal` JOIN `escuela` `e` ON `e`.`id` = `p`.`id_escuela` JOIN `cursos` `c` ON `c`.`id` = `dg`.`id_curso` JOIN `cursos_base` `cb` ON `cb`.`id` = `c`.`id_cursos_base` JOIN `schoolyear` `s` ON `s`.`id` = `dg`.`id_schoolyear` WHERE `dg`.`id_schoolyear` = '1' ORDER BY `e`.`nombre`, `cb`.`nombre_curso`
